note: committed artifact for §16 paper claims — regenerate with runs/deeper_brain_measure.py

bpb_ab.verdict: P1/P2 NEUTRAL on bits/byte (|Δ|<0.05) = do-no-harm; value is behavioural/compute, not loss

p0_forgetting.verdict: generative resists forgetting WORSE than the raw buffer (buffer-free) — and buffer-free dreaming at anchor_frac=0 actively CORRUPTED the representation (worse than no replay), so the earlier single-seed 'helps' does NOT replicate

stress_protection.verdict: under an OOD stress flood the cortisol gate throttles plasticity and PROTECTS prior knowledge

drive_arousal.verdict: unmet drive raises NE→arousal→ generation diversity (exploration); satiation focuses

p2_ignition.verdict: selective ignition runs ~50% of auxiliary systems per cycle (not all-on) → ~50% compute saved

neurogenesis.verdict: no measurable separation gain at this scale/interference
